nasb.text: On the day that he goes into the sanctuary, into the inner court to minister in the sanctuary, he shall offer his sin offering,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: And on the day that he goes into the Holy Place, into the inner court, to minister in the Holy Place, he shall offer his sin offering, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 他進入內院，到聖所去，在聖所供職的時候，他要獻上贖罪祭。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 他进入内院的圣所事奉时，要为自己献上赎罪祭，这是主耶和华说的。
